name: Lincoln National Corporation
description: Lincoln National Corporation, operating as Lincoln Financial Group, is a prominent American holding company that provides a diverse range of financial services, including insurance, retirement planning, and investment management. Founded in 1905 and headquartered in Radnor, Pennsylvania, the company is recognized for its commitment to integrity and financial security. Through its various subsidiary businesses, Lincoln Financial Group offers life insurance, annuities, and workplace solutions, helping individuals and families navigate their financial futures while upholding the values and ideals associated with its namesake, President Abraham Lincoln.
